completion_promises.criterion_text: ContentFormat enum defines exactly json, markdown, text and nothing else
completion_promises.evidence: Created ContentFormat string enum in src/fleet_memory/relay/schema.py with exactly three values: JSON='json', MARKDOWN='markdown', TEXT='text'. Tests test_content_format_has_exactly_three_values and test_content_format_values_are_lowercase verify this.

completion_promises.criterion_text: MemoryEpisodeV1 parses a valid structured-JSON envelope and a valid markdown envelope without error
completion_promises.evidence: MemoryEpisodeV1 model successfully parses both JSON and markdown envelopes with all required fields. Tests test_parses_valid_json_envelope_without_error and test_parses_valid_markdown_envelope_without_error demonstrate error-free parsing.

completion_promises.criterion_text: content_format is stored as-is (an unrecognized value like "yaml" does NOT raise at parse time — it is routed/parked downstream)
completion_promises.evidence: content_format field is declared as str (not validated against ContentFormat enum), allowing any value to be stored. Test test_content_format_stored_as_is_for_unrecognized_value verifies that unrecognized values like 'yaml' are accepted at parse time.

completion_promises.criterion_text: MemoryEpisodeV1 uses ConfigDict(extra="ignore") so unknown envelope fields are dropped, not rejected
completion_promises.evidence: MemoryEpisodeV1 uses model_config = ConfigDict(extra='ignore') for forward compatibility. Test test_extra_fields_ignored_not_rejected verifies unknown fields are silently dropped during parsing.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Chunk is immutable (frozen) and carries index, text, source_ref, project
completion_promises.evidence: Chunk model uses ConfigDict(frozen=True) for immutability and defines all four required fields: index (int), text (str), source_ref (str | None), project (str). Tests test_chunk_is_frozen_immutable and test_chunk_carries_all_required_fields verify immutability and field presence.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests assert round-trip parse for each ContentFormat and the extra-field-ignore behaviour
completion_promises.evidence: Created comprehensive unit tests covering round-trip parsing for all three ContentFormat values (json, markdown, text) in tests test_round_trip_parse_for_json_format, test_round_trip_parse_for_markdown_format, and test_round_trip_parse_for_text_format. Test test_round_trip_parse_preserves_extra_field_ignore_behavior verifies extra field handling during round-trip.
